news.summary: A federal judge in the US agreed to pause a lawsuit filed by 18 state attorneys general and DeFi Education Fund against the SEC due to a potential resolution following a leadership transition. The case was put on hold for 60 days by Judge Gregory Van Tatenhove on April 16, with a requirement for a joint status report within 30 days. Paul Atkins was sworn in as the new SEC chair, replacing acting chair Mark Uyeda. The lawsuit accused the SEC of exceeding its authority in targeting crypto exchanges, with 18 attorneys general from Republican states involved. The DeFi Education Fund, Blockchain Association, and Texas Blockchain Council also dropped their lawsuit against the IRS over the broker rule on April 16 as it became moot after President Trump revoked the rule. The SEC under its new leadership has paused or dropped high-profile lawsuits against crypto companies.
news.headline: US court halts 18-state lawsuit against SEC due to leadership change; judge orders a 60-day stay - parties optimistic for resolution. DeFi groups drop IRS case over broker rule on April 16. NY AG urges Congress to keep pensions crypto-free.
Ageas has announced a new total of issued shares.
Communication sector and industry performance analyzed by Bloomberg, featuring latest data and insights.

news.summary: Bhutan is considering harnessing its hydropower resources for Bitcoin mining to boost its economy while maintaining its environmental objectives. In an interview, the CEO of Bhutan's sovereign wealth fund, Druk Holding and Investments Ltd., disclosed the nation's plans for environmentally friendly cryptocurrency mining. It was noted that each digital coin mined in Bhutan with hydropower essentially cancels out one mined using fossil fuels. The sovereign wealth fund, overseeing Bhutan's sole power generation since 2019, aims to promote green mining practices. This initiative aligns with global efforts to adopt sustainable energy sources for cryptocurrency activities, emphasizing the importance of clean and renewable energy in the sector's growth.
news.headline: Bhutan considers using hydropower for Bitcoin mining, exploring green coin sale; CEO mentions offsetting fossil fuels.
BoJ's Nakagawa: US tariffs will likely push Japan economy downward through reduced trade, corporate profits and impact on markets.

news.summary: Despite Bitcoin's price swinging around $85,000, social media posts about Bitcoin have turned bullish, with traders optimistic about it reaching $90K. The last time Bitcoin was above $90,000 was on March 6. Santiment's social media tracker showed a score of 1.973 in favor of Bitcoin on April 16, up from below 1.606 denoting neutrality. If Bitcoin surpasses $85,000, around $254 million in short positions could face liquidation. Bitcoin is currently at $84,390 and up 2.73% over the last seven days. Various crypto traders have shared positive sentiments about Bitcoin's potential, with some suggesting it could hit $500,000. However, other sentiment trackers like the Crypto Fear & Greed Index show a 'Fear' score of 30 out of 100, possibly due to the weak first quarter performance of Bitcoin and Ether, which saw declines of 11.82% and 45.41% respectively. It is important to note that this article does not provide investment advice, and readers should conduct their own research before making any financial decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin market sentiment turned bullish as traders aim for $90K amidst $85K price swings. BTC at $84,390, up 2.73% in a week. Source: CoinMarketCap. Potentially $254M in shorts at risk if price surpasses $85K. Various key figures express optimism for Bitcoin, predicting significant growth. Crypto Fear & Greed Index remains cautious at 30 out of 100. Magazine: Discusses potential of AI digital twin technology. No investment advice provided.

news.summary: In a recent update on April 17, 2025, Hexagon AB revealed their intention to purchase the Unified Communications Radio Suite (UCRS) software assets from CONET Communications GmbH (CCOM), a division of the CONET Group. This acquisition aims to enhance Hexagon AB's existing public safety platform. The UCRS software is known for its high efficiency and is expected to bring significant value to Hexagon AB's offerings in this sector.
news.headline: Hexagon to acquire CONET Communications UCRS software assets to enhance public safety platform capabilities.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Shanghai, the Company Noah Holdings Limited, listed on NYSE as NOAH and on HKEX as 6686, is a prominent wealth management service provider. Noah offers comprehensive advisory services on global investment and asset allocation. They are known for being pioneers in this field, catering primarily to...
news.headline: Noah Holdings awarded for ESG excellence in S&P Global Sustainability Yearbook 2025 in China, a top wealth management provider.

news.summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULTA) based in Bolingbrook, Illinois, has named Lauren Brindley as the new Chief Merchandising and Digital Officer starting June 3, 2025. Brindley takes over from Monica Arnaudo, who is set to retire in June. In her new role, Brindley will oversee Ulta Beauty’s merchandising, ecommerce, wellness, and marketplace initiatives, as well as spearhead the assortment brand building strategy. The transition marks a significant change for the company as it navigates its digital and retail operations.
news.headline: Ulta Beauty names Lauren Brindley Chief Merchandising & Digital Officer, effective June 3, 2025. Brindley succeeds Monica Arnaudo.

news.summary: A US federal judge has agreed to pause a lawsuit filed by 18 state attorney generals and the crypto lobby group DeFi Education Fund against the Securities and Exchange Commission due to potential resolution under new SEC leadership. The lawsuit, filed in November, alleged SEC overreach in targeting crypto exchanges and was supported by Republican attorney generals from states like Nebraska, Tennessee, and Ohio. The new SEC chair, Paul Atkins, succeeded acting chair Mark Uyeda and former chair Gary Gensler. Additionally, the DeFi Education Fund, Blockchain Association, and Texas Blockchain Council dropped their lawsuit against the IRS over the agency's DeFi broker rule, which was revoked by President Donald Trump in April. The SEC under its new leadership has also paused or dropped several lawsuits against crypto companies this year.
news.headline: US court halts state AGs' suit against SEC after new leadership change; 60-day stay ordered by judge due to potential case resolution.

news.summary: Last month, the economy added 250,000 jobs, surpassing experts' projections by 20,000. The unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in the past decade. The manufacturing sector saw the most significant growth, adding 50,000 jobs, while the service industry added 200,000 jobs. These promising numbers indicate a robust economic outlook for the upcoming months.
news.headline: Company X buys back 1 million of its own shares.

The webinar, conducted in English, is open to all shareholders and stakeholders. It is scheduled to be held on April 24, 2025, starting at 12:00 (EEST). This event provides an opportunity for attendees to gain insights into the company's results during the specified period.
news.headline: AS Tallink Grupp to discuss Q4 and full-year 2024 results in investor webinar on April 24, 2025 at 12:00 (EEST).

news.summary: On March 31, 2025, the Ordinary general meeting of shareholders for Šiaulių Bankas AB approved the profit allocation. This includes a dividend payout of 0.061 euros for each ordinary registered share valued at 0.29 euros. Shareholders as of the record day on April 14, 2025, will receive these dividends.
news.headline: Šiaulių Bankas AB to pay out 0.061 euro dividend per share with nominal value of 0.29 euro on 14 April 2025.

news.summary: AB “Ignitis grupė” has announced that the Kelmė wind farm I, under its subsidiary UAB “Ignitis renewables”, has achieved commercial operation status.
news.headline: 114.1 MW Kelmė wind farm I in Lithuania, operated by Ignitis Renewables, has reached commercial operation.

news.summary: Today in Jakarta, Indonesia, BDx Data Centers (BDx), a rapidly expanding data center operator in the Asia-Pacific region, revealed its certification in the NVIDIA DGX-Ready Data Center program. This certification includes BDx's impressive 500-megawatt (MW) CGK4 AI Campus in Indonesia.
news.headline: BDx in Indonesia joins NVIDIA DGX-Ready Data Center program, powering AI with 500MW at CGK4 Campus.

news.summary: Recently in Road Town, British Virgin Islands, Markets4you was acknowledged by Global Business Magazine as the Most Innovative Forex Trading Solutions Provider for the year 2025. This prestigious award underscores Markets4you's dedication to providing cutting-edge and easy-to-use trading services.
news.headline: Markets4you wins 2025 Innovation Award for Forex Trading Solutions, cutting indices trading costs.

news.summary: IFINWIL® has received registration from the Therapeutic Goods Administration in Australia, a significant development for children diagnosed with neuroblastoma, who typically are as young as 2 years old. The average survival rate for children with high-risk neuroblastoma is a mere 50%. Norgine, based in Uxbridge, England, made the announcement on April 17, 2025, emphasizing the importance of the registration for expanding treatment options for these young patients.
news.headline: IFINWIL® (eflornithine) registered in Australia for high-risk neuroblastoma, enhancing treatment for children.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, California, the Marine Mammal Care Center (MMCC) is facing challenges due to the death and stranding of numerous California sea lions and dolphins on beaches in Los Angeles County. Amidst this crisis, a positive development has emerged in the form of a crucial public-private collaboration with the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA). This partnership played a pivotal role in the rescue of an entangled adult gray whale sighted near Rancho Palos Verdes, close to Trump National Golf Club and Terr. This incident highlights the importance of cooperation in safeguarding marine life, with significant support from NOAA.
news.headline: NOAA & MMCC free entangled gray whale off Palos Verdes Coast, amid rise in sea lion and dolphin deaths.

news.summary: Venture capital firm A16z has written a letter urging the SEC to update custody regulations to permit Registered Investment Advisors (RIAs) to directly hold cryptocurrency assets.
news.headline: A16z urges SEC to amend custody rules for RIAs to hold crypto assets.

news.summary: JPMorgan Asset Management recently highlighted the appeal of investment opportunities in Asian stocks focused on domestic markets. According to the report, these 'domestic-oriented' stocks are gaining attention for their strong growth potential amidst global uncertainties. The firm emphasized that these stocks are resilient and offer attractive prospects for investors. With Asia's increasing economic importance, this sector is becoming more alluring for those seeking stable returns. JPMorgan Asset Management's analysis points to the opportunities present in these stocks, indicating the potential for significant returns. This reflects a growing trend in the investment landscape, with Asian stocks offering a promising outlook for investors looking to capitalize on the region's economic growth.
news.headline: Asian 'Domestic-Focused' Stocks Offer Investment Potential, JPMorgan Asset Management Highlights

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking a decrease from the previous rate of 5.1%. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the job market, with a total of 500,000 new jobs being created in the past month alone. The report also highlighted that the average hourly wage has seen a 3% increase compared to last year. Economists predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, signaling a strong recovery for the economy.
news.headline: Xi calls for unity in ‘Asian Family’ amid Trump’s tariffs pressure on trade partners.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on April 17, 2025, Tiinlab Corporation, the parent company of 1MORE, is transforming the landscape of intelligent acoustic manufacturing amidst swift changes in global supply chains. By implementing an AI-powered, vertically integrated production system, Tiinlab is setting a new benchmark for efficiency and innovation in the industry. This move comes at a crucial time as companies worldwide are reevaluating their operations in response to current market trends.
news.headline: Tiinlab Corporation leads in intelligent acoustic manufacturing with AI-enabled production ecosystem amid global supply chain changes.

news.summary: Transaction costs on the Ethereum network have dropped to $0.168 per transaction, the lowest level in five years, due to decreased activity on the blockchain. The reduction in fees is a result of fewer Ether transactions and interactions with smart contracts. Ethereum network fees fluctuate based on supply and demand, with lower activity leading to lower fees. The decrease in fees may impact price rebounds, as traders are waiting for global economic uncertainties to pass before increasing their frequency of transactions. ETH has fallen 12.5% in 14 days, trading under $1,600. The Pectra upgrade, set for May 7, will improve network capacity, reduce fees, and introduce stablecoin payment options. Further phases aim to enhance data storage efficiency and scalability. The upgrade follows the Dencun upgrade in March 2024, which improved Ethereum's layer-2 networks.
news.headline: Ethereum fees hit 5-year low at $0.168 per tx amid low network activity. Pectra upgrade set for May 7 to reduce fees and congestion. ETH down 12.5% in 14 days to $1,600, ready for potential rebound. Proposed Phase two may improve scalability by 2026.

news.summary: Xi Jinping, the Chinese President, called for unity among Asian nations in response to increasing pressure from the US regarding trade. President Donald Trump has imposed tariffs on billions of dollars worth of Chinese goods, escalating tensions between the two largest economies in the world. Jinping emphasized the importance of regional cooperation to address common challenges and strengthen economic ties. The US has implemented tariffs on approximately $250 billion of Chinese imports, prompting retaliatory actions from China. Jinping's call for unity aims to position Asian countries as a united front against the trade policies enforced by the US. The ongoing trade dispute has significantly impacted global markets and raised concerns about the future of international trade relations.
news.headline: Xi calls for 'Asian Family' unity amid Trump's tariff pressure on trade partners.com
Commercial recovery and revenue decline seen in Q1 2025 after financial restructuring, with limited cash use.

news.summary: A recent report has revealed that the global economy is projected to grow at a rate of 4.5% in 2022, representing a significant increase compared to the previous year. The growth is expected to be driven by key factors such as improved consumer confidence, government stimulus packages, and higher levels of investment activity. Additionally, global trade is forecasted to expand by 5.8% during the same period, indicating a strong recovery in international commerce. The report also highlights that emerging markets are set to experience robust growth, with an estimated increase of 6.5% anticipated for the year. This positive outlook is further supported by the prediction that global inflation will remain moderate at around 3.2%, providing a conducive environment for sustained economic expansion. Furthermore, it is suggested that the employment rate is likely to improve, with approximately 30 million new jobs expected to be created worldwide. These developments indicate a promising outlook for the global economy in 2022, with various indicators pointing towards a period of recovery and growth.
news.headline: Record gold prices soar amid trade tensions and Powell's comments, fueling safe-haven demand.

news.summary: Elico's advanced water monitoring technology has been successful in identifying pollutants, improving water usage efficiency, and meeting environmental standards. The company, based in SAN ANTONIO, announced its achievements on April 17, 2025. Frost & Sullivan conducted a recent evaluation of Elico's smart water quality solutions, recognizing their effectiveness in ensuring regulatory compliance and enhancing overall water management.
news.headline: Elico praised for efficient water management solutions, detecting contaminants, and ensuring compliance. Frost & Sullivan assessment in San Antonio on April 17, 2025.

news.summary: An executive from Kura Sushi will give a keynote speech on the key factors for successful cross-border listings at the Japan Go IPO Summit scheduled in Tokyo and New York on April 16, 2025. The summit, jointly organized by Nasdaq and MarcumAsia, will feature a number of notable speakers to share insights on this topic.
news.headline: Japan Go IPO Summit on June 5 in Tokyo with Kura Sushi Executive as keynote. Hosted by Nasdaq and MarcumAsia.

news.summary: Raydium has launched its memecoin-making protocol, LaunchLab, aiming to compete with Pump.fun. The arrival of LaunchLab on April 16 follows Pump.fun's move to its own decentralized exchange, PumpSwap. LaunchLab will leverage Raydium's pools and aims to surpass Pump.fun as the leading Solana memecoin launchpad. Tokens needing 85 SOL to transition to Raydium's AMM have already surpassed this. Raydium says creators can launch tokens for free and earn 10% of trading fees post-graduation. The news triggered a 14% RAY token price surge, hitting $2.41 before settling at $2.21. PumpSwap's daily trading volume records a $460 million surge, breaking the previous high of $454.9 million on April 16 for the fourth consecutive day above $400 million. Since its March 22 launch, PumpSwap has processed $7.3 billion in total volume.
news.headline: Raydium unveils LaunchLab to challenge Pump.fun in Memecoin-making. LaunchLab tokens surpass 85 SOL, worth $11,150. RAY token surges 14%. PumpSwap volume hits record $460M and totals $7.3B since Mar 22. Magazine explores Memecoin funding anti-aging research.

news.summary: At the end of March, the net asset value (NAV) of EfTEN United Property Fund units stood at 11.35 euros, rising by 0.6% monthly. The fund reported a net profit of 178 thousand euros for March and 703 thousand euros for the first quarter of 2025, a significant increase from the previous year's 93 thousand euros. If the fund's investment in EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS shares were based on its NAV, the NAV of EfTEN United Property Fund would be 11.48 euros, marking a 1.3% monthly increase.
news.headline: NAV of EfTEN United Property Fund as of 31.03.2025 is 11.35 euros, with a monthly increase of 0.6%. Net profits: March: 178k euros, Q1: 703k euros (up from last year). If accounting for shares in EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS, NAV would be 11.48 euros, with a monthly increase of 1.3%.
